storyInfo: Signora dei Lupi Caesar unexpectedly switches scents with Projekt Red, and she will never forget the Fang she's never acknowledged—all of this was planned by Lappland, in order to give the wolfpack a warning.

attributes.content: So you're here as well, Vargo...?
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Are you implying my sense of smell is worse than yours?
attributes.name: Vargo

attributes.content: What I mean is, we've found the right place—that thing is inside the ward.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Sending us wolves to search every nook and cranny of the landship just to find a little keepsake Lappland happened to misplace... do you not find it funny?
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Enough grumbling, Caesar.
attributes.name: Vargo

attributes.content: We agreed the pack leader has the power to issue any order.
attributes.name: Vargo

attributes.content: So let's finish this quickly.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Is that... your Fang?
attributes.name: Vargo

attributes.content: ...Red.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: (Snoring softly)
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: (Pained muttering)
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Lappland's scent...
attributes.name: Vargo

attributes.content: From the dagger in Projekt Red's hands.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: How could Lappland's lost keepsake be your Fang's dagger?
attributes.name: Vargo

attributes.content: Hmph. Our alpha she may be, but the white wolf is ultimately still just a pup.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Hey, Zaaro.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: That cloud of dust there was just wild burdenbeasts trying to get out of Rhodes Island's way, no?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Is there a need to ask me when the barrens lie right before our eyes?
attributes.name: Zaaro

attributes.content: Patience, now.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Doesn't sound like something you'd say.
attributes.name: Zaaro

attributes.content: A landship just happens to stray off course into the depths of the wastes, and brushes by those mysterious roaming beings just as we happen to be on the deck, just so we can say hello...
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: You know how much effort I've put into arranging this special meeting for you and your kind, so why rush me?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: You didn't have to trouble yourself.
attributes.name: Zaaro

attributes.content: We could've gone to Lungmen, or Acahualla. The few kin over there are far easier to track down.
attributes.name: Zaaro

attributes.content: Haha. Zaaro, the wolfpack's becoming more human indeed.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Hm?
attributes.name: Zaaro

attributes.content: I mean, I could simply invite Texas's boss to listen to underground rap, or I could meet that Duck Lord at the gambling tables. Quite a few times I've done so in Siracusa.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: But they're a minority amongst the Beast Aristocrats, no?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Say your so-called 'crisis' is truly so terrible, yet your first move is to find your kin hiding within human society, and hold a meeting like mortals do?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Call the other wolves back. Your kin will come soon.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Caesar is still hunting your keepsake... wait, you didn't lose it, did you?
attributes.name: Zaaro

attributes.content: I never had a keepsake to begin with, Zaaro.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Then...
attributes.name: Zaaro

attributes.content: You intended for Caesar to meet the Fang she abandoned?
attributes.name: Zaaro

attributes.content: Haha, I didn't say that.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Grandma?
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: I see you, Grandma...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: She's asleep.
attributes.name: Vargo

attributes.content: All you did was to get closer and she trembles so much in her dreams... her fear of you has seeped into her bones.
attributes.name: Vargo

attributes.content: Heh.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: A dreamland...
attributes.name: Vargo

attributes.content: Enough, Caesar. This is dull and distasteful. Just take the dagger and go.
attributes.name: Vargo

attributes.content: That dagger is my gift to Red.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: When she had just started to understand what was going on around her, I found a beast fang and taught her how to grind it down into the sharpest dagger ever made.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Vargo

attributes.content: You still don't get it? Lappland made me come here on purpose.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Does she want me to take the dagger back? No. She wants me to eliminate the fear and pain in this human, to rid my influence from her.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Hm, that doesn't seem like her style.
attributes.name: Vargo

attributes.content: Helping a poor colleague out, or perhaps expressing goodwill to the pharmaceutical organization she affiliates herself with... it is not hard to guess her intentions.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Which is why, as I said before: Our alpha she may be, but the white wolf is ultimately still just a pup.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Wait here, Vargo. I'll finish this senseless 'mission' in the blink of an eye.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Red.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Grandma... it's really you...?
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Who else could it be...? Truly, a poor child you are.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Tsk. Operator Projekt Red, this is the fifth time you've been on my tail ever since I boarded this landship.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: The scent...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: I smell something familiar, on you.
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: If you mean the wolves' scent, there's more than one on me.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Grandma...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Is Grandma here too?
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Did she ask you to replace me?
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: It sounds like... you want to kill me?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: If the Doctor and your boss who loves hiding in smoke won't be investigating, I'd be glad for a little exercise.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: No... I don't want to fight you.
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: I don't know how to explain... Grandma found you, and you'll become like me. In the end, you'll...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Haha, thank you for your concern.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: You're trembling, Red.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Grandma, she said to me...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: I am like the ones I killed.
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: I was only—
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Only winning her an insipid victory.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: I listened to Grandma, and I didn't listen to Kal'tsit...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: I did something wrong, and again, and again...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: I am both a huntress and true wolf.
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Who am I?
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: My heart feels so... messy.
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: (Pained sobbing)
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Do you hate that wolf, Red?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Do you wish to forget her?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Fear not—we are on Rhodes Island. Your Rhodes Island.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: I'd be glad to help you.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: That's it?
attributes.name: Zaaro

attributes.content: That's it. How could I just ignore her while Kal'tsit's away from Rhodes Island?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Lappland, are you hoping I will praise your passion, or your kindness?
attributes.name: Zaaro

attributes.content: Zaaro, are you hoping I will take your words as flattery, or sarcasm?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Grandma, where are you going this time?
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Grandma never left. I've been waiting for you to catch up to me.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: The young red wolf subconsciously raises her foot, but quickly comes to her senses and ends up holding still.
Do not doubt me, child. Do you think there is still a need for me to fool you?
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Your doubt, your pain. I will answer them both.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Come over, to Grandma's side.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: A familiar voice, gentle words. A slight breeze blows through grassland, scraping a faint fishy smell from the soil... it is very safe here.
As if nothing has changed at all.
For a long time.
In the end, the young wolf cannot help but to step forward.
Is this a dream?
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: A dream, and yet reality.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Follow me, Red.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Why the silence? You would always pepper me with questions whenever we reunited... even when you were unable to string proper words together.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: I know. You harbor hate in your heart, you blame me.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: You lied to me.
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: I trust you. So you shouldn't have lied.
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: 'Shouldn't', child? There can't be such a dull feeling between us.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: You've lied to me too after all, haven't you?
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: On Carnevale night. You did not kill Agnese's Fang. What was that whelp called again?
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: L-Lunacub.
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: You stayed your hand, you wanted to test me.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Because...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: The Signori dei Lupi may break their Fangs, but a she-beast will not abandon her children. She may swaddle them in lies, but pure relations made in the wastes will always stay strong.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Both Rhodes Islanders and that tailor... they do not understand the wastes, but you believed their words, and let a hole form in our relationship.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: The truth is no longer important, and the same goes for who wins or loses...
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: This is the humiliation Grandma ought to shoulder, and also your rightful punishment, my child.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: I remember this place...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: I said before: this is a dream, and yet reality.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: The grass here... You taught me how to hide my scent and wait quietly for prey...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: This tree... You taught me how to make traps and hide them under dead leaves...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: That rock over there...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: You used to sharpen that tooth on it, until it became the sharpest dagger.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Every forest, cave, and skeleton we've passed by... this is your history.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: You're taking me back...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Where will we stop?
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: You will know in time.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Are you still thinking about our conversation earlier?
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: I must.
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: My heart feels so... messy. I don't get it.
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Truth be told, we Signori dei Lupi have played our game too many times to count, yet you have been my most special Fang.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Only you live and think like a true wolf, so much so that you will never manage to assimilate into the humans on this landship, no matter how long you stay here...
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: You are too pure. You are the truest wolf there is.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: The truest...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: So, my child. Forget what I said earlier. Forget the hate and blame between us.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Because emotions like those are too complicated for you... you are not to blame.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: We're finally here.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Th-This is...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Where we met. I found you abandoned in that grass nest over there. So heavy was the rain that night your cries were almost washed away.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: There is where our journey ends, and where everything began.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: I will burn that nest, and then, what we have just experienced will have never existed.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: I don't understand...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: I'll forget Grandma?
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: I'll forget everything about Grandma?
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: You will forget the confusion, pain, and grief I have brought upon you, as if I'd never existed...
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: ...I won't have nightmares?
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: That's right. What a clever girl you are.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Silence.
The young red wolf lowers her head, her knuckles white from clenching her fists too hard. She says nothing, seemingly in the deepest throes of her pain.
The graceful Signora dei Lupi does not move any closer. She decides to give the wolf cub a little time, even if... her own patience has long since withered to near nothing.
Finally, the young wolf looks up.
Grandma, I don't want it.
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Do you hate that wolf, Red?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Do you wish to forget her?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Fear not—we are on Rhodes Island. Your Rhodes Island.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: I'd be glad to help you.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: I don't know...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: You don't know?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: That means you don't want to.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: I don't want to? No one's taught me how to deal with this...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: You're on the mark, Projekt Red.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Your life is woven of betrayal and lies, and pain drives you to wish you could forget.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: But it's no use forgetting. Just like pulling out your tendons and bones, turning yourself into an empty shell... is that not a crueler form of violence?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: You know the wilderness well. Nightmares will also help you to live.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Um...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Haha, an idea just came to me.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: I don't have to forget.
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: You warned me, I remember your words...
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: I have to remember hate, to keep my eyes on my enemies, so I won't get lost, so I can keep my blade moving... so I can live on.
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: I used to take revenge for you... revenge on enemies that never existed.
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: I'll avenge myself now!
attributes.name: Projekt Red

attributes.content: Red kicks up high into the air, a wolf's hunting technique.
In a blink, she slices the Signora dei Lupi in two.
The mysterious dark mist scatters as blood rains on Red, giving her a demonic demeanor.
Her hand shakes violently, as if she does not dare believe what she has just done... and she faints.
But just as quickly, the dark mist converges once more, and the Signora dei Lupi manifests before Red again.
Did the dreamland give you the audacity to act against me? Anything done here amounts to nothing.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Fine, if you don't wish to forget, then live on with all you know of me. Let the nightmares layer over one another, let pain stack on more pain.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: That's all well and good...
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: The old game is no more, but I do not trust Lappland as much as Zaaro and the others do, that she can bring us a new form of joy...
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: I shall leave you as a lasting mark of this era.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: But I dare say I will forget you in a blink, wolf cub.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: After all, you are no different from the other Fangs I have broken in the past.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Come out, Vargo. We should go. The stench here is unbearable.
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: No... this scent. Something's wrong...
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Is this a trick of yours, Lappland?
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Vargo, did I hear right, hmm? Caesar just questioned the alpha?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Why is Red's scent on me?!
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Really? That can happen?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Let me think... what just happened...?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Red wounded you with her blade, and your blood spilled onto her...
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Hahahaha. Could it be, you and your Fang switched scents?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: That was just a dream I granted her!
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Burning it away?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Haha, what heavy rain we have here...
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Are you hoping to rid yourself of that odor?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: It's no use, my dear Signora dei Lupi.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Agnese told me eons ago, when this land was only wild... The wolves roamed in their packs, exchanging scents to communicate with each other and mark your territories...
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: It was how you hunted together, and how you hunted each other...
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: There is no way to rid yourself of another wolf's scent on you, until the curtain falls on your life.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Red's dagger...
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: That dagger is indeed a keepsake of mine... and I've bestowed an 'alpha's blessing' upon it.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: So it was you who taught Lappland, Agnese...
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: I'm not the only one she asked. I had no idea what she was planning to do with the knowledge.
attributes.name: Agnese

attributes.content: Oddio! I forgot one thing...
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: The Signori dei Lupi are immortal.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Ugh...
attributes.name: Zaaro

attributes.content: Caesar. It seems you have no choice but to continue your travels on this land wearing Red's scent.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Even though you've never looked your Fang in the eye, even though you've long since cast her away, her scent will forever remind you of her existence, and you will never forget her.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Because you will never die, and so it will never go.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: (Mournful howl)
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Of course, you can punish me at any time. It will only bring more fun to my new game.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Why do all this?
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: To do all this as an alpha just for a young friend of yours, to scheme and shame your own wolfpack like this?
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: Are you implying I did this only out of sympathy for Red?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Hmph. What a childish Signora dei Lupi.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Caesar, I did not humiliate you for Red alone.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Zaaro, Vargo, Agnese, and the few over there... I hope this will keep you all on your toes—
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: The wolfpack is indeed becoming more human.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: The barrens are vast, wild, chaotic. I don't care how cruel you treat humans or even your kin... this is simply how things are in the wilds.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: But Caesar, your cruelty toward your Fangs is just like that of humans.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Deceit, betrayal, whitewashing, warping her cognition, planting nightmares in her head... you play with the crudest forms of power, no?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: (Sniffs)
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: (Huffs helplessly)
attributes.name: Caesar

attributes.content: All of you tell me, how that so-called 'crisis' draws near, and the wolfpack must contact more of your kind...
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: From Sami's icefields to Bolívar's Black Flow, from Sargon's deserts to Iberia's salt flat... there are few Beast Aristocrats used to colluding with mortals.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: So of course, I shall prove this new wolfpack will be purer than ever before.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Hey, Lappland.
attributes.name: Zaaro

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: They'll be here soon.
attributes.name: Zaaro

attributes.content: Time to leave this dreamland and let that Red kid enjoy a good night's sleep.
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: Let us return to the deck...
attributes.name: Lappland

attributes.content: My wolves, it's time for our appointment in the barrens.
attributes.name: Lappland
